title: Create subitem based on Calendar date
excerpt: I need to be able to create a subitem on the last day of each month.  (Or first day of month if I cannot build an automation based date.)  I have about 150+  items, on the last day of each month I need to add a subitem. …

posts.author: wscharenbroch (Wendy Scharenbroch)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to be able to create a subitem on the last day of each month. (Or first day of month if I cannot build an automation based date.) I have about 150+ items, on the last day of each month I need to add a subitem. I am relatively new to Monday, so any help would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!
